rationale: The cited paper appears methodologically and substantively central: it develops VAR/impulse-response decomposition of immediate, adjustment, and permanent promotion effects, and the citing paper uses a closely related persistence framework (unit-root/cointegration, VAR/VECM, impulse responses) to study long-term promotional effects. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior persistence-modeling promotion research, which matches the cited paper’s core contribution on long-term promotion effects. Given this strong overlap in constructs and approach, this is not an obvious incidental mention.
